scripts.setup: pnpm install && cd backend/core-api && dotnet restore && cd ../ai-api && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.db:sync: cd backend/core-api && dotnet ef database update --project OptiLifts.Infrastructure --startup-project OptiLifts.API
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend/core-api && dotnet watch run --project OptiLifts.API/OptiLifts.API.csproj
